summary: Leading red team operations and penetration testing engagements across banking sector clients, covering Active Directory infrastructure, mobile applications, and internal web platforms.
highlights: Conducted full-scope internal penetration tests against banking clients, executing complete Active Directory attack chains through to Domain Admin
Performed authorized mobile application assessments against Android banking apps, covering OTP bypass, biometric bypass, JWT analysis, and insecure storage
Built and deployed a phishing simulation framework using EvilGoPhish, including custom O365 phishlet configuration and AWS EC2 infrastructure planning
Developed penetration testing project management documentation including Rules of Engagement, Scope of Work, and NDA templates aligned with CBS 122 and PCI-DSS compliance requirements

summary: Delivering network and application penetration tests with a focus on credible exploitation paths and actionable reporting.
highlights: Executed assessments across infrastructure and web application targets
Translated technical findings into remediation guidance for stakeholders
Collaborated with teams to validate fixes and reduce repeated issues

summary: Built responsive web experiences and handled operational IT work across deployment, maintenance, and user support.
highlights: Delivered responsive interfaces and custom front-end behavior
Supported infrastructure and endpoint reliability work
Bridged technical execution between product needs and IT operations
